subject: ela
title: Finding the Main Idea
content: The main idea is what a passage is mostly about. Supporting details explain, prove, or give examples of the main idea. A good reader looks for repeated ideas, the title, and the most important point of the paragraph.

choices: What the text is mostly about

questions.hint: Details help explain the main point.

questions.prompt: Which clue can help you find the main idea?
questions.hint: Look for ideas that appear more than once.

questions.prompt: If a paragraph gives many facts about saving water, the main idea is probably about:
questions.hint: Pick the idea all facts connect to.

questions.prompt: Which is usually NOT a main idea?
choices: What the passage is mostly about
questions.hint: A tiny example is usually a detail.
